description: Start an Appium session on a local device (auto-detect) or a named cloud provider (BrowserStack, Sauce Labs, LambdaTest). Prefer scenario-specific capability files when the user intent is clearly local Android, local iOS, or LambdaTest.
when_to_use: User asks to start or connect a device session without naming a specific profile
User asks to begin mobile automation and platform is unclear or mixed
User requests a cloud provider by name
User passes profile_name to reuse saved capabilities
prerequisites: Local: Appium at http://127.0.0.1:4723 and a booted simulator or adb device
Cloud: CLOUD_USERNAME and CLOUD_ACCESS_KEY; cloud_device_name and cloud_os_version required when cloud_provider is set
LambdaTest: for device-wide flows use cloud_auto_launch false plus Android package/activity or iOS bundle id per implementation

saved_profile.description: Load platform, device, and cloud fields from a profile created via save_capability_profile. Other arguments are ignored.

local_auto.description: Pick the first available local device (booted iOS simulator preferred if present, else Android).

local_android.description: Local Android only; optional device_name substring match.

local_ios.description: Local iOS simulator only; optional device_name substring match.

cloud_lambdatest_android_app.description: LambdaTest Android with uploaded app artifact.

cloud_lambdatest_android_device_wide.description: LambdaTest Android device-wide; opens Settings then use press_home_button for home.

cloud_lambdatest_ios_app.description: LambdaTest iOS with uploaded app artifact.

cloud_browserstack.description: BrowserStack cloud session; provide app URL/id as required by your project.

slot_prompts.profile_name: Which saved capability profile name should load?
slot_prompts.platform: Use auto, android, or ios. For cloud, set platform to match the device OS.
slot_prompts.device_name: Local only: substring of simulator or adb device name.
slot_prompts.cloud_provider: One of: browserstack, saucelabs, lambdatest. Required whenever any other cloud_* or cloud app field is set.
slot_prompts.cloud_device_name: Cloud device name from the provider catalog.
slot_prompts.cloud_os_version: OS version string for the cloud device.
slot_prompts.app: Cloud app identifier (e.g. lt://..., bs://..., or Sauce storage id).
slot_prompts.cloud_auto_launch: LambdaTest: false for device-wide with explicit package/activity or bundle id.
slot_prompts.cloud_app_package: LambdaTest Android: package to activate (e.g. com.android.settings).
slot_prompts.cloud_app_activity: LambdaTest Android: activity relative (.Settings) or fully qualified.
slot_prompts.cloud_bundle_id: LambdaTest iOS: bundle id to activate (e.g. com.apple.Preferences for Settings).

examples.query: Start session from saved profile qa-android
Start LambdaTest iOS session for uploaded app
